portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.content:
This very project. Very minimal and static, as nothing is needed besides list of all projects that I created.

Features:

  • multiple themes
  • multiple languages

tictactoe.title: Tic-tac-toe
tictactoe.content:
Simple Vue project implementing tic-tac-toe game.

Features:

  • human vs human or human vs AI
  • difficulty levels, including perfect gameplay (using miniMax algorithm)
